sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الصَّبْرُ مَنْزِلَةً رَفِيعَةً مِنْ مَنَازِلِ الدِّيْنِ، وَهُوَ ضِيَاءٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِ فِي دَيَاجِيرِ الْمِحَنِ وَالْبَلَايَا.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje se smatra visokim stepenom među stepenima vjere, ono je svjetlo vjerniku u tminama iskušenja i nevolja.
sentences.translationEn: Patience is considered a lofty station among the stations of religion; it is a radiance for the believer amidst the darkness of trials and tribulations.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ حَثَّنَا الْمُصْطَفَى ﷺ عَلَى التَّمَسُّكِ بِالصَّبْرِ، مُبَيِّناً أَنَّ أَمْرَ الْمُؤْمِنِ كُلَّهُ خَيْرٌ؛ فَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ سَرَّاءُ شَكَرَ فَكَانَ خَيْراً لَهُ، وَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ ضَرَّاءُ صَبَرَ فَكَانَ خَيْراً لَهُ [أَخْرَجَهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الزُّهْدِ، حَدِيثُ رَقْمِ ٢٩٩٩].
sentences.translation: Odabrani Poslanik, s.a.v.s., podsticao nas je na strpljenje, pojašnjavajući da je svako stanje vjernika dobro; ako ga zadesi radost, on zahvali pa mu bude dobro, a ako ga zadesi nedaća, on se strpi pa mu opet bude dobro [Muslim, Kitab al-Zuhd, 2999].
sentences.translationEn: The Chosen One (PBUH) urged us to cling to patience, explaining that the entire affair of a believer is good; if prosperity touches him, he is thankful, and that is good for him, and if adversity touches him, he is patient, and that is also good for him [Sahih Muslim, Book of Asceticism, Hadith 2999].

sentences.arabic: وَيُفَصِّلُ شَيْخُ الْإِسْلَامِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ فِي أَنْوَاعِ الصَّبْرِ، مُعْتَبِراً أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ عَلَى الطَّاعَةِ وَعَنِ الْمَعْصِيَةِ أَكْمَلُ مِنَ الصَّبْرِ عَلَى الْمَقَادِيرِ الْمُؤْلِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Šejhul-islam Ibn Taymiyyah detaljno objašnjava vrste strpljenja, smatrajući da je strpljenje u pokornosti i ustezanje od grijeha potpunije od strpljenja u bolnim odredbama.
sentences.translationEn: Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah elaborates on the types of patience, considering patience in obedience and refraining from sin to be more complete than patience regarding painful decrees.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الصَّبْرَ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ كَفِّ النَّفْسِ عَنِ التَّسَخُّطِ، بَلْ هُوَ طُمَأْنِينَةٌ قَلْبِيَّةٌ تَنْبَعِقُ مِنْ كَمَالِ الثِّقَةِ بِحِكْمَةِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje nije samo suzdržavanje duše od negodovanja, već je to smiraj srca koji izvire iz savršenog povjerenja u Allahovu mudrost.
sentences.translationEn: Patience is not merely restraining the soul from discontent; rather, it is a cardiac tranquility emanating from perfect trust in Allah's wisdom.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُبْتَلَى الَّذِي يَحْتَسِبُ أَجْرَهُ عِنْدَ خَالِقِهِ يَنْقَلِبُ بَلَاؤُهُ فِي حَقِّهِ عَطَاءً وَمِنْحَةً.
sentences.translation: Onome ko je iskušan, a nada se nagradi kod svog Stvoritelja, iskušenje se pretvara u dar i blagodat.
sentences.translationEn: For the afflicted one who seeks reward from his Creator, his trial transforms into a gift and a blessing.

sentences.arabic: وَيَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَعْلَمَ أَنَّ عِظَمَ الْجَزَاءِ مَعَ عِظَمِ الْبَلَاءِ، وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ إِذَا أَحَبَّ قَوْماً ابْتَلَاهُمْ لِيُهَذِّبَهُمْ لَا لِيُعَذِّبَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Musliman treba znati da veličina nagrade dolazi s veličinom iskušenja, te da Allah, kada zavoli jedan narod, stavi ga na iskušenje kako bi ga odgojio, a ne kaznio.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim should know that the greatness of the reward is commensurate with the greatness of the trial, and that when Allah loves a people, He tests them to refine them, not to punish them.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَجَرُّعَ مَرَارَةِ الصَّبْرِ فِي الدُّنْيَا يُورِثُ حَلَاوَةَ الرِّضَا فِي الْآخِرَةِ، حَيْثُ يُوَفَّى الصَّابِرُونَ أَجْرَهُمْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ.
sentences.translation: Ispijanje gorčine strpljenja na dunjaluku donosi slatkoću zadovoljstva na ahiretu, gdje će strpljivima nagrada biti data bez računa.
sentences.translationEn: Swallowing the bitterness of patience in this world bequeaths the sweetness of contentment in the Hereafter, where the patient will be given their reward without account.

sentences.arabic: وَلَا يَتَسَنَّى لِلْعَبْدِ بُلُوغُ هَذِهِ الْمَرْتَبَةِ إِلَّا بِالِاسْتِعَانَةِ بِاللَّهِ وَدَوَامِ الذِّكْرِ.
sentences.translation: Rob ne može dostići ovaj stepen osim uz traženje pomoći od Allaha i stalni zikr.
sentences.translationEn: A servant cannot reach this rank except by seeking aid from Allah and constant remembrance.

sentences.arabic: فَالصَّبْرُ مِفْتَاحُ الْفَرَجِ، وَبِهِ تُنَالُ الْإِمَامَةُ فِي الدِّينِ كَمَا قَرَّرَ الْعُلَمَاءُ.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje je ključ spasa, a njime se dostiže predvodništvo u vjeri, kako su utvrdili učenjaci.
sentences.translationEn: Patience is the key to relief, and through it, leadership in religion is attained, as scholars have established.

sentences.arabic: فَلْنُوَطِّنْ أَنْفُسَنَا عَلَى تَحَمُّلِ الشَّدَائِدِ بِقُلُوبٍ رَاضِيَةٍ وَنُفُوسٍ مُطْمَئِنَّةٍ بِقَضَاءِ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, pripremimo svoje duše na podnošenje nedaća zadovoljnim srcima i dušama smirenim u Allahovoj odredbi.
sentences.translationEn: Let us, therefore, habituate ourselves to enduring hardships with contented hearts and souls reassured by Allah's decree.
